articles.title: Most Emerging Market Currencies Rebound Amid ‘Headline Fatigue’
articles.summary: Most emerging-market currencies are rebounding on Thursday from losses the day before as oil edges lower, with investors playing down the scope of resumed hostilities between the US and Iran.

articles.title: Tech Drives US Stocks Higher as Traders Downplay Iran War Risks
